title: cardamine tuberosa subsp. cognata
intro: Cardamine tuberosa subsp. cognata, also known as the red-rooted bittercress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cardamine tuberosa subsp. cognata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or added to topical creams and ointments.
